title: Sun & Moon - Absolute Solver
description: Resource pack changes the texture of the sun and the moon
body:
### What this resource pack does:
**This pack replaces the default sun and moon textures in Minecraft with an image of Absolute Solver.**

### Why you might want to download it:
**You might want to download it if you're a fan of Murder Drones and want the sun and moon in Minecraft replaced with images of Absolute Solver.**

### Additional Information:
**Shader used in screenshots: Complementary Reimagined**
